product_overview: PMS Pro is a cloud-based, mobile-first production management web app for garment manufacturers that digitizes the full 6-step production lifecycle (requirement → approval → cutting → dispatch → collection → settlement) and provides real-time visibility, per-step delay detection, and admin analytics (see pipeline diagram on page 4 and feature summary on pages 5–7).
core_goals: Raise and record new production requirements with multi-size breakdowns and structured item catalog
Approve or reject requirements and route jobs through the correct production steps (including conditional skipping of inhouse cutting)
Log cutting, dispatch (naame), goods received (jama), and final settlement to maintain accurate piece counts
Give production teams and managers instant, real-time visibility of job status and delays across the pipeline
Generate cutting bills (Hisab) as downloadable PDFs and export or sync job data with Google Sheets
Allow admins to manage master data (categories, subcategories, items, personnel) and correct raw job data via a protected analytics dashboard

features.name: Live Dashboard
features.description: Real-time overview of all active jobs with search, date & step filters, daily dispatch log ('Aaj Ke Naame'), and quick Google Sheets sync (Pull/Push). The dashboard surface displays per-job current step, balance quantities, and status indicators (On Track / Late / Complete) as described on pages 5–6 and shown on the main Dashboard (page 1).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See live job list with current step and status indicators -> Use search to find job by Job Number or Item Name -> Apply step filter to narrow results -> Open a job's detail to observe current step, responsible person, balance quantity and delay
Navigate to / -> Open date range selector -> Enter start date later than end date -> See date-range validation error
Navigate to / -> Trigger Pull from Sheets -> Confirm pull action -> See new or updated jobs appear in the live job list
Navigate to / -> Trigger Push to Sheets -> Confirm push action -> See success confirmation that job records were exported

features.name: Production Forms (6-step Job Workflow)
features.description: Multi-step forms to create and progress jobs through Steps 1–6. Includes color-coded step selector, smart job routing (shows only pending jobs for the chosen step), cascade item catalog (Category → Subcategory → Item), confirmation popup before submission, and multi-size quantity support (detailed on pages 4 and 5).
user_flows: Navigate to /forms -> Select step from dashboard or navigation (Step 1) -> Fill job details (Category, Subcategory, Item) -> Enter size and quantity details -> Review confirmation popup showing structured summary -> Confirm submission -> See new job created and visible on the Dashboard (/)

Navigate to /forms -> Select step from dashboard or navigation (Step 2) -> Search for and select a pending job -> Fill approval decision and indicate whether cutting is inhouse -> Review confirmation popup -> Confirm submission -> See job move to Step 3 if cutting is inhouse or skip to Step 4 if cutting is external

Navigate to /forms -> Select step from dashboard or navigation (Step 3) -> Search for and select pending cutting job -> Fill who did the cutting and actual pieces cut per size -> Review confirmation popup -> Confirm submission -> See cutting entry recorded and job status updated

Navigate to /forms -> Select step from dashboard or navigation (any step) -> Leave required field (e.g., Category) empty -> Attempt to confirm submission -> See required-field validation error preventing submission

features.name: Cutting Reports & Hisab PDF
features.description: Cutting team module with Pending and Completed tabs plus a Hisab (bill calculator) that calculates totals and generates a formatted PDF invoice for a cutting person over a selected date range (functionality described on pages 5 and 9).
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Open Pending tab -> See list of jobs awaiting inhouse cutting with size details and waiting time -> Select a pending job -> Enter actual pieces cut -> Confirm entry -> See job move to Completed tab
Navigate to /reports -> Open Hisab tab -> Select cutting person and date range -> Enter per-piece rate for each listed job -> Review calculated totals -> Generate Hisab PDF -> Download the PDF
Navigate to /reports -> Open Hisab tab -> Enter a negative per-piece rate -> See validation error preventing PDF generation

features.name: Production Pipeline View & Thekedar Insights
features.description: Stage-grouped pipeline overview that groups active jobs by production stage, highlights late jobs, and provides per-karigar/thekedar workload insights (see pipeline diagram and Thekedar Insights on page 5).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch view to Pipeline View -> See jobs grouped by stage with counts and late-job indicators -> Tap a stage to view the list of jobs in that stage sorted by most delayed first -> Inspect a job to view its timeline
Navigate to / -> Switch to Thekedar Insights within pipeline view -> See list of thekedars with their active job counts and workloads -> Select a thekedar to view only jobs assigned to them
Navigate to / -> Open Pipeline View -> Apply category filter (e.g., Tops/T-shirts) -> See pipeline stages update to show only jobs from selected category

features.name: FMS Modules (Bilty, Purchase, Order2Delivery)
features.description: Freight and order management sub-modules for logistics and procurement where users can navigate between Bilty, Purchase, and Order2Delivery tabs and submit related logistics or procurement data (entry point: /fms).
user_flows: Navigate to /fms -> Switch to Purchase tab -> Fill procurement data for an order (vendor, items, quantities) -> Submit procurement entry -> See entry listed in Purchase log
Navigate to /fms -> Switch to Bilty tab -> Fill bilty details for a dispatch -> Submit bilty entry -> See bilty added to the day's dispatch records
Navigate to /fms -> Switch to Order2Delivery tab -> Enter delivery tracking details -> Submit -> See order delivery status updated in the module

features.name: Admin Control & Analytics
features.description: Password-protected admin area (/admin) with a login at /admin/login that provides executive KPIs, interactive analytics (volume trends, pipeline funnel, delay analysis, bottleneck table), raw data explorer with CSV export, and System Modifications for direct data corrections and master data management (details on pages 7 and 10).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See /admin dashboard with Executive KPI Bar and analytics sections
Navigate to /admin -> Open Master Data Mgmt -> Edit a Category or add a new Item in the 3-level catalog -> Save changes -> See updated catalog available immediately in /forms
Navigate to /admin -> Open Raw Data Explorer -> Search for a job by Job Number -> Edit a raw field value -> Confirm modification -> See updated job reflected in Dashboard (/) and forms

features.name: Smart Delay Detection Engine
features.description: Built-in working-hours aware time intelligence that calculates per-step deadlines (Mon–Sat, 10:00–19:00) and surfaces On Track / Late / Complete indicators on every job card, pipeline view, and admin analytics (thresholds listed on page 6).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe job cards showing On Track or Late indicators based on working-hours thresholds -> Tap a late job to inspect delay hours and step history
Navigate to /forms -> Complete Step 4 (Naame) and set lead time -> See system calculate expected Jama date and update job's planned completion
Navigate to / -> Filter jobs by Status = Late -> See only jobs that have exceeded their allowed working-hours threshold

routes.description: Main dashboard showing job overview and stats
Freight and Order management system sub-modules
Admin panel for master data management

features.name: Job Management Workflow
user_interactions: Select step from dashboard or navigation
Confirm and submit entry via popup

features.name: FMS Modules
features.description: Specialized modules for Bilty, Purchase, and Delivery tracking
user_interactions: Navigate between Bilty, Purchase, and Order2Delivery tabs

features.name: Admin Control
features.description: Manage master data lists for dropdowns and app configuration
user_interactions: Edit categories, items, and personnel lists

known_limitations.issue: Local dev server may be slow for concurrent tests
